zh.lifeSummary: Alice de Rafin是Bertram Rafin和Mrs Bertram Rafin的女兒，於1153年出生在英國賀特福爾。她於大約1174年與Ralph de Neville在英國林可爾史爾斯可頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1197年在英國艾可格亞特 哈林波利享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rafin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Ephraim, Meyer, Morry, Moysey, Myer, Ofer, Rivkah, Shimon, Shira, Shoshanna.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): status name for a rabbi, from Polish, Ukrainian, and Belorussian rabin ‘rabbi’, ultimately from Hebrew rav.
French (southern): derivative of   Raba   ‘turnip, oilseed rape’.

variants.name: Rabinovich
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Boris, Mikhail, Leonid, Vladimir, Yefim, Aleksandr, Igor, Iosif, Lev, Arkadiy, Arkady, Grigoriy.  Jewish Yakov, Naum, Aron, Isaak, Moisey, Isak, Moysey, Basya.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): patronymic from Rabin , formed with the East Slavic patronymic ending -ovich.

variants.name: Rapin
meanings: French:
derivative of Old French rapine ‘pillage’ (from Latin rapina), used as a nickname for a rapacious person or a thief.
alternatively, a variant of   Rabin   2, a topographic name denoting residence on ravined terrain, ultimately of the same etymology as 1 above.

variants.name: Raba
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Manfred.
Polish: status name from rab ‘servant; slave’, or an altered form of German Rabe . Compare Hungarian and Czech name Rab .
Czech: variant of Rab or a nickname from the dialect rabit se ‘to get excited’.

variants.name: Raben
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hymen.
German: from an ancient Germanic personal name containing the element hraban ‘raven’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Rabin  .

variants.name: Rabine
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Reinhardt.
Jewish: variant of   Rabin  .
Americanized form of German   Rehbein  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

en.lifeSummary: Alice de Rafin was born in 1153, in Hertfordshire, England as the daughter of Bertram Rafin and Mrs Bertram Rafin. She married Ralph de Neville about 1174, in Scotton, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1197, in Great Hallingbury, Essex, England, at the age of 44.

Elle a épousé Ralph de Neville environ 1174, à Scotton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1197, à Great Hallingbury, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Rafinは1153年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアでBertram RafinとMrs Bertram Rafinの娘として生まれた。約1174年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスコットオンでRalph de Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1197年にイギリスエセックスグレアト ハリングブリーで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Rafin(은)는 1153년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 Bertram Rafin(와)과 Mrs Bertram Rafin의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1174년 영국 링코실르 스콧에서 Ralph de Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1197년 영국 에세스 그리트 핼링버이에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Ralph de Neville aproximadamente 1174, em Scotton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Alice de Rafin родилась в 1153 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Bertram Rafin и Mrs Bertram Rafin. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Neville около 1174 г. в местности скоттон, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1197 г. в местности грит холлингбури, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.
